{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Shyrax's fury
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Shyrax's fury]] manifests as a gold-burning violent [[aura]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
